title: Music Discs : Ultimate
description: Adds more music to Minecraft. Feel free to suggest any song you want!
body:
**Music discs ultimate mod!**
The mod will add more music discs that add music from around the world, you can suggest a song if you want. I will update it as much as i can!
The mod doesn't add any other type of blocks or entities, only music discs! The mod will contain music from around the world and will be playable using a disc. The mod doesn't affect performance or a server in any way and doesn't change anything in the gameplay. Just a simple mod.
